name: Create Growth Mindset SEL Lesson
description:
A school counselor needs a 4-page Social-Emotional Learning (SEL) flipchart on Growth Mindset. Create a flipchart with the following structure:

Page 1: Title 'Growth Mindset', a brain shape, and subtitle 'What happens when we believe we can grow?'.

Page 2: Title 'Fixed Mindset vs Growth Mindset' and a T-chart comparing 'Fixed Mindset' ('I can't do this', 'This is too hard', 'I give up') and 'Growth Mindset' ('I can't do this yet', 'This is a challenge I can tackle', 'I'll try a different strategy').

Page 3: Title 'The Power of Yet' with at least three transformations (e.g., 'I don't understand' -> 'I don't understand yet') using arrow shapes to connect the pairs.

Page 4: Title 'My Growth Mindset Goal', a star shape, and the prompt 'I will keep trying when things get hard because...'.

Save the flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/growth_mindset_lesson.flipchart.
